picks.title: Anthropic confidentially submits draft S-1 to the SEC

picks.reason: VSCode漏洞可一键窃取GitHub令牌，安全风险极高。

picks.title: Florida sues OpenAI and Sam Altman over AI risks
picks.reason: 佛罗里达州起诉OpenAI，AI监管法律战升级。

picks.title: Trump signs downsized AI order after weeks of reversals

picks.title: 32GB of DDR5 now costs $375 – AI shortage continues to squeeze PC building
picks.reason: DDR5内存因AI短缺涨价，影响PC硬件市场。

trendSummary: 本周AI圈热点集中在模型突破与应用工具并进：Claude新版本发布、OpenAI模型攻克数学难题，同时多款开源工具与个人项目引发关注，行业持续活跃。
